description_long: This is a heavy-duty yellow tripod stand equipped with two rectangular LED floodlights mounted on a horizontal bar at the top. The tripod features three sturdy, telescopic legs with reinforced joints and black rubberized feet for stability on various surfaces. The central column is adjustable in height and includes a locking mechanism for secure positioning. A visible power cable runs from the lights down the central shaft, suggesting the lights are electrically powered. The floodlights are encased in black housings with protective glass fronts, and the overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some plastic and rubber components. This type of tripod is commonly used for temporary lighting in construction sites, garages, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A robust yellow tripod stand with two mounted LED floodlights and adjustable telescopic legs, designed for portable lighting in urban or worksite settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile of the tripod and the vertical alignment of the central column, with the power cable visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both LED floodlights, the horizontal mounting bar, and the full spread of the tripod legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, highlighting the telescopic leg structure and cable routing.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backs of the LED floodlights and the tripod's central support structure.
